events_logged: friction_corrected (when memory_write fires for a feedback memory)
upskilling_pass_emitted (when the agent emits the end-of-session report)

repeated_correction.shape: operator corrects the same class of mistake 3+ times in N sessions
repeated_correction.action_at_threshold: Emit a candidate to promotion-candidates/; consider promoting to a discipline-plugin rule

repeated_dev_task_shape.shape: agent performs the same multi-step sequence of edits across 3+ sessions
repeated_dev_task_shape.action_at_threshold: Surface to operator; if confirmed pattern, write a skill candidate for promotion to platform

showcase_pattern.shape: a UI/integration pattern the site is supposed to demonstrate is built ad-hoc
showcase_pattern.action_at_threshold: Surface to the operator with a note that the same pattern should be exposed as a live demo on the deployed site
